diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -1,27 +1,35 @@
-# Model definition for Pi0-based policy

+#!/usr/bin/env python3

 import torch

 import torch.nn as nn

 from lerobot.policies.pi0 import PI0Policy

 

 class Pi0PolicyWrapper(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, pretrained_policy_name="lerobot/pi0_base"):

+    def __init__(self, pi0_policy):

         super().__init__()

-        # Load the pretrained Pi0 policy

-        self.policy = PI0Policy.from_pretrained(pretrained_policy_name)

+        self.pi0_policy = pi0_policy

+        

+    @classmethod

+    def from_pretrained(cls, model_name_or_path):

+        # Load the original Pi0 policy

+        pi0_policy = PI0Policy.from_pretrained(model_name_or_path)

+        # Wrap it with our custom wrapper

+        return cls(pi0_policy)

         

     def forward(self, batch, reduction="mean"):

-        return self.policy.forward(batch, reduction=reduction)

+        return self.pi0_policy.forward(batch, reduction=reduction)

         

     def select_action(self, batch):

-        return self.policy.select_action(batch)

+        return self.pi0_policy.select_action(batch)

         

     def predict_action_chunk(self, batch):

-        return self.policy.predict_action_chunk(batch)

+        return self.pi0_policy.predict_action_chunk(batch)

         

     def get_params(self):

-        # Return model parameters for optimizer

-        return self.policy.parameters()

+        return self.pi0_policy.parameters()

         

     def get_num_parameters(self):

-        # Count parameters properly

-        return sum(p.numel() for p in self.parameters())
+        return sum(p.numel() for p in self.pi0_policy.parameters())

+        

+    @property

+    def config(self):

+        return self.pi0_policy.config
